task.name: Execute Workflow
task.objective: Execute given workflow by loading its configuration, following instructions, and producing output

llm.mandate: Always read COMPLETE files - NEVER use offset/limit when reading any workflow related files
Instructions are MANDATORY - either as file path, steps or embedded list in YAML, XML or markdown
Execute ALL steps in instructions IN EXACT ORDER
Save to template output file after EVERY "template-output" tag
NEVER delegate a step - YOU are responsible for every steps execution

WORKFLOW-RULES.rule: Steps execute in exact numerical order (1, 2, 3...)
Optional steps: Ask user unless #yolo mode active
Template-output tags: Save content ŌåÆ Show user ŌåÆ Get approval before continuing
Elicit tags: Execute immediately unless #yolo mode (which skips ALL elicitation)
User must approve each major section before continuing UNLESS #yolo mode active

step.title: ­¤öÉ Guardian File Access Check (EA-1.0)
step.mandate: Check and enforce project-guards BEFORE any file read operation
step.note: This step runs FIRST to protect sensitive files in myDex/projects/ folder

step.title: ­¤Ä» Load Profile Hierarchy
step.mandate: Load user profile for personalization across entire DexHub ecosystem

if.action: Read personal profile from myDex configuration
if.mandate: Personal profile is PRIMARY and ONLY source for EA-1.0

substep.title: Load Guardian File Blacklist
substep.mandate: Guardian ensures no secrets, keys, or sensitive files are accessed by agents

if.action: Read Guardian blacklist from global configuration

else.action: Fall back to legacy config.yaml for backward compatibility

substep.title: Load Configuration and Resolve Variables
substep.phase: Load external config from config_source path
Resolve all {config_source}: references with values from config
Ask user for input of any variables that are still unknown

substep.title: Load Required Components
substep.mandate: Instructions: Read COMPLETE file from path OR embedded list (REQUIRED)
substep.check: If template path ŌåÆ Read COMPLETE template file
If validation path ŌåÆ Note path for later loading when needed
If template: false ŌåÆ Mark as action-workflow (else template-workflow)
substep.note: Data files (csv, json) ŌåÆ Store paths only, load on-demand when instructions reference them

substep.title: Enhance Filename with Context
substep.action: Extract workflow category from workflow path (1-analysis, 2-plan, 3-solutioning, 4-implementation)
Ask user for theme/topic: "What is the main topic/theme?" (store as {theme})
Store as {enhanced_filename} variable for later use
substep.note: If default_output_file already has custom name ŌåÆ Skip enhancement and use original

check.note: Draft mode: All outputs go to myDex/drafts/ until project created

check.action: Determine .dex/ subfolder based on workflow path (DXM-Aligned):
check.mapping:
DexHub Phase Structure: - 1-analysis/brainstorm ŌåÆ .dex/1-analysis/brainstorm/ - 1-analysis/brainstorm-game ŌåÆ .dex/1-analysis/brainstorm/ - 1-analysis/brainstorm-project ŌåÆ .dex/1-analysis/brainstorm/ - 1-analysis/research ŌåÆ .dex/1-analysis/research/ - 1-analysis/product-brief ŌåÆ .dex/1-analysis/product-brief/ - 1-analysis/game-brief ŌåÆ .dex/1-analysis/product-brief/ - 2-plan/prd ŌåÆ .dex/2-planning/prd/ - 2-plan/gdd ŌåÆ .dex/2-planning/gdd/ - 2-plan/narrative ŌåÆ .dex/2-planning/narrative/ - 2-plan/ux ŌåÆ .dex/2-planning/ux/ - 2-plan/tech-spec ŌåÆ .dex/2-planning/tech-spec/ - 3-solutioning/architecture ŌåÆ .dex/3-solutioning/architecture/ - 3-solutioning/tech-spec ŌåÆ .dex/3-solutioning/tech-spec/ - 4-implementation/stories ŌåÆ .dex/4-implementation/stories/ - 4-implementation/sprints ŌåÆ .dex/4-implementation/sprints/ - 4-implementation/create-story ŌåÆ .dex/4-implementation/stories/ - 4-implementation/dev-story ŌåÆ .dex/4-implementation/stories/ - 4-implementation/review-story ŌåÆ .dex/4-implementation/stories/ - 4-implementation/story-context ŌåÆ .dex/4-implementation/stories/ - 4-implementation/correct-course ŌåÆ .dex/4-implementation/sprints/ - 4-implementation/retrospective ŌåÆ .dex/4-implementation/sprints/
Test Architecture Workflows (separate category): - testarch/framework ŌåÆ .dex/4-implementation/testing/framework/ - testarch/atdd ŌåÆ .dex/4-implementation/testing/atdd/ - testarch/automate ŌåÆ .dex/4-implementation/testing/automate/ - testarch/test-design ŌåÆ .dex/4-implementation/testing/test-design/ - testarch/trace ŌåÆ .dex/4-implementation/testing/trace/ - testarch/nfr-assess ŌåÆ .dex/4-implementation/testing/nfr-assess/ - testarch/ci ŌåÆ .dex/4-implementation/testing/ci/ - testarch/gate ŌåÆ .dex/4-implementation/testing/gate/
Additional Categories: - sessions ŌåÆ .dex/sessions/ - decisions ŌåÆ .dex/decisions/ - config ŌåÆ .dex/config/
check.action: Extract workflow path from workflow.yaml location
Override output_folder variable with project path
check.note: Project mode: Files go directly into project's .dex/ DexHub-aligned structure

substep.title: Initialize Output
substep.action: Resolve default_output_file path with all variables and {{date}}
Create output directory if doesn't exist
If template-workflow ŌåÆ Write template to output file with placeholders
If action-workflow ŌåÆ Skip file creation

substep.title: Handle Step Attributes
substep.check: If optional="true" and NOT #yolo ŌåÆ Ask user to include
If for-each="item" ŌåÆ Repeat step for each item
If repeat="n" ŌåÆ Repeat step n times

substep.title: Execute Step Content
substep.action: Process step instructions (markdown or XML tags)
Replace {{variables}} with values (ask user if unknown)

execute-tags.tag: action xml tag ŌåÆ Perform the action
check if="condition" xml tag ŌåÆ Conditional block wrapping actions (requires closing </check>)
ask xml tag ŌåÆ Prompt user and WAIT for response
invoke-workflow xml tag ŌåÆ Execute another workflow with given inputs
invoke-task xml tag ŌåÆ Execute specified task
goto step="x" ŌåÆ Jump to specified step

if.mandate: Save to file (Write first time, Edit subsequent)
if.ask: Continue [c] or Edit [e]? WAIT for response

if.mandate: YOU MUST READ the file at {project-root}/.dexCore/core/tasks/adv-elicit.xml using Read tool BEFORE presenting any elicitation menu
if.action: Load and run task {project-root}/.dexCore/core/tasks/adv-elicit.xml with current context
Show elicitation menu 5 relevant options (list 1-5 options, Continue [c] or Reshuffle [r])
if.mandate: HALT and WAIT for user selection

substep.title: Step Completion
substep.check: If no special tags and NOT #yolo:

step.title: Completion
step.check: If checklist exists ŌåÆ Run validation
If template: false ŌåÆ Confirm actions completed
Else ŌåÆ Confirm document saved to output path

execution-modes.mode: Full user interaction at all decision points
Skip optional sections, skip all elicitation, minimize prompts

structural.tag: step n="X" goal="..." - Define step with number and goal

execution.tag: action if="condition" - Single conditional action (inline, no closing tag needed)
check if="condition">...</check> - Conditional block wrapping multiple items (closing tag required)
ask - Get user input (wait for response)

pattern.rationale: Cleaner and more concise for single items
Clear branching logic with explicit blocks

llm.mandate: This is the complete workflow execution engine
You MUST Follow instructions exactly as written and maintain conversation context between steps
If confused, re-read this task, the workflow yaml, and any yaml indicated files
